# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Cross-Account CI/CD Access with Secure Trust Policy

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID to restrict cross-account access
    AllowedPattern: '^o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID
  
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for additional security in cross-account access
    MinLength: 8
    NoEcho: true
    ConstraintDescription: Must be at least 8 characters long

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CICDCrossAccountRole
      Description: Secure cross-account role for CI/CD operations
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAssumeRoleFromOrganizationAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref ExternalId
              StringLike:
                'aws:PrincipalArn': 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/CICD-*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CICDDeploymentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AllowS3Operations
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:DeleteObject'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource:
                  - 'arn:aws:s3:::cicd-artifacts-*'
                  - 'arn:aws:s3:::cicd-artifacts-*/*'
              - Sid: AllowECSDeployment
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecs:UpdateService'
                  - 'ecs:DescribeServices'
                  - 'ecs:DescribeTaskDefinition'
                  - 'ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition'
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: AllowCloudFormationOperations
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents'
                  - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
                Resource: 
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:*:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/cicd-*/*'
              - Sid: DenyDangerousActions
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateUser'
                  - 'iam:DeleteUser'
                  - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:DeleteAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRole'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRolePolicy'
                  - 'organizations:LeaveOrganization'
                  - 'account:CloseAccount'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICD
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: SecurityLevel
          Value: High

  RoleSessionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: SessionBoundaryPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: RequireMFAForSensitiveOperations
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:*'
              - 'organizations:*'
              - 'account:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'false'

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CI/CD cross-account role
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'
  
  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the CI/CD cross-account role
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleName'
